title: IIT Kanpur Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: IIT Kanpur Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
IIT Kanpur Asia Pacific Associates, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Subject Matter Expert for our Varanasi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIT Kanpur Asia Pacific Associates:
IIT Kanpur Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIT Kanpur Asia Pacific Associates!
